    same = same + 1;

      local blockValue = same;
      blockValue = blockValue + 1;

!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'laterLocal'.
    local laterLocal = 1;
    
    local outer = outer + 1;
    outer = outer + 1;
    
    function flowForLuaLocal() {
      local narrowed: string | number;
      narrowed = 1;
      local reader = () => narrowed;
      reader();
    }
